reviews.review_description: This feels like a rushed product, lazy, it's all right,

This game graphics and voice acting are so terrible it deserves 5 stars. I laughed so hard while playing. They are so bad that it's funny. Be sure not to skip the video intro;it's super funny. The game play, though glitchy,  is acutually fun. I'd say it's worth buying. even if only for a good laugh.

It is good game with free movement and freedom enjoyment of riding car, helicopter, bus, tank etc. Sickness may arises after playing for more than 20 minutes. If you get sickness easily like me then don't buy this game.
This is just fun. I played this a lot on DK2 and while it seems to have been stripped down, it's still a good time.

developer_response.body: Hi buddy, we have released a new version.Now you can jump and ride tank/apache and many cool vehicles in  CA. And now you can intiate/cease bullet-time in CA. Plus,we had added 6 levels. Hope it will give you a better game experience.

reviews.review_description: Keeps turning off can I get a refund please...how do i get refund..i do not see options for refunding

This is one of the most fun games I've played in VR. However, it has some pretty bad issues with running poorly (on S7 edge) and crashing. It also makes your phone heat up extremely fast. The intro is really cheesy, and I'm not sure if it's intentional, but I laughed either way. Using a bluetooth controller to play this is a must. If this was optimized and updated with a better intro, multiplayer, and a nice coat of polish, I'd give it 5 stars because of how fun it is.

reviews.review_title: Best vr game title i played
reviews.review_description: Now this is the most fun ive had in vr and it works great on my s7 edge even though it's a year old now and it runs smoothly best game i've played

Don't get me wrong though, the title is true. This game is super addictive and really a purchase I don't regret. However,  I have to mute the game. The sound is terrible. Tons of lag in the audio which makes my head hurt. And maybe a tiny bit of lag in game. But otherwise, one of my favorites. I'm using a brand new s8 and new vr headset. Update and fix, and this would be 5 stars.
Great game,so funny!I love it

I had a 1 star rage review out there for a while. It's time to update... This game is a fun arcade like game with the visuals of a Suda51 game. I give this 3 stars because it "tries" to do something missing from most VR games. 

The biggest issue I have, is the depth of this game and by that I don't mean the gameplay but the visuals. It doesn't feel immersive at all, the stereoscopic use in this game is VERY bad sometimes you can't even tell if it's 3d or not. Which is a shame. And a different voice over would be good too. Don't get me wrong your English is fine but still...

developer_response.body: Sorry for our English voice, we can't afford native English voice actor, so we speak it by ourself. But, as you mentioned, we have contact native English speaker to take the voice. So , please listen it again in our next update.

reviews.review_description: This is what i have been waiting for more of these games please well worth the money top game

Moving freely around the map is great ! Hammer's leg animation looks really lame; can be easily improved.  The game would have been a rock star if using first person view instead of 3rd in my opinion I guess nobody is perfect. Tons of fun and a city on fire !

developer_response.body: We thought to using first person view instead of 3rd, but after test we find it will bring user strong VR sickness, so we decide to use 3rd view at last. Thanks for your comment!

reviews.review_description: All those levels put together in open world sandbox + first gear VR MMO (even with these graphics) + in app purchases = "Oprah rich"...do yourselves a favor and make that game.
I really loved this game, it's no GTA 5 but for the first free roaming city shooter allot of fun was to be had,
Free and smoove movement and very entertaining. Thumbs up  :) would give 5 Stars if jumping was added

developer_response.body: Hi buddy, we have added jump to the game. Plus, we have added roll, now you can roll backward/forward/left/right. And you can initiate/cease bullet time, ride tank/apache/turret and many cool vehicles.We added 6 levels and improved AI, and added a movie to introduce our hero's story!

reviews.review_description: It's a fun game with minimalistic graphics. I wish it was in 3d. Also please add go controller support.

While simple looking, there's a ton of fun to be had here. My suggestions are:

- player needs a jump button!
- Reduce the players health, as most levels are too easy
- Some vehicle controls are glitchy. Also, vehicles should be steered with the second analog stick.
- Add sound effects for enemy gunfire and more music tracks.

I hope to see more updates or possibly a sequel to this game. The concept is great.

developer_response.body: Thank for your reviewing. In our latest version, we have added jump and roll! We have increased enemy's AI, so now the levels' difficulty got a risen. We have set the vehicle's spin control in second analor stick. And our new version have many other cool things like bullet time,ride tank/apache/etc,movie, hope you can enjoy our new version.

reviews.review_description:
Ok this game was super epic to begin with but let me tell you what!  The slow motion addition, the flying the chopper! The ability to jump has brought it to the most EPIC game played on the VR. I have played many games on the VR and purchased many and have been super dissatisfied with a lot of them. But you developers hit this one out of the park again! The updates took a great gamr game and brought it to incredible epic awesomeness!!! I enjoyed it so much i came back to re-up my review!!! I am excited to see what the creators create next, perhaps one like this where you can free roam in a city? If you don't have this game and want to be SUPER ENTERTAINED GET IT!!!!! only update that could be added now would be a first person view but hey thats not really needed. This game Rules of epic proportions!!!! 5 stars on top of 5 stars!!!!

My first review is below. Also thank you for responding to my post, and thanks for adding things i suggested. Nice to know i was heard. Im a super gamer and this vr is cool but I've noticed a lot of the games are  not that fun. This one is Down Right entertaining!!! Peace and Love ya awesome programmers!!!

 The creators did an excellent job, I understand rendering graphics in 3d and writing code takes up an abundance of time and effort, I do hope very much that the team who created this game continues to create a city Avenger 2 with better graphics, better sound effects, missions not so easy as well, I think you are on the right track though, it was still excellent fun to be able to free reign through the boards. If you are debating on purchasing debate no further BUY IT. also maybe on the next one add a jump feature and add a story, I can honestly see this game evolving and having many titles in the future 5 stars my friends!
Gave up after the first 5 minutes of playing.
It's fun to mess around in for sure the guns are mint and slow motion is also really mint
